equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: the audited v2 port has LLM error-fee handling, but the DA delivery hasError constant-fee path and DA compile-time bound are absent.

checked_queries: hasError Image Audio Video FHE Phase 2 constant fee
DA error settlement fees bounded compile time
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Image, Audio, Video, and FHE Phase 2 delivery result handling has no hasError=true short-circuit that bypasses normal output extraction and applies a DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI executor fee.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/constants.rs defines LLM_ERROR_EXECUTOR_FEE_WEI and one compile-time assertion, but no DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI or multimodal/FHE bound assertion.
crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs calculates normal ZK, persistent-agent, audio, video, and agent Phase 2 fees, but has no delivery_has_error or calculate_da_error_fees_phase2 symbol.

crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs and crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs route audio/video deliveries through normal extraction and fee calculation without a hasError short-circuit.
The old /home/ritual/repos/ritual-reth-internal checkout contains delivery_has_error/calculate_da_error_fees_phase2, but it is not one of the audited local repos for this port batch.

notes: Searches across all audited repos found only the LLM has_error path; DA hasError handling appears only in the non-audited older checkout.
rationale: The commit message labels this consensus-critical, and the diff adds the shared hasError helper and DA error fee function, then wires the same short-circuit into builder and verifier branches for Image, Audio, Video, and FHE. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For Image, Audio, Video, and FHE Phase 2 delivery results, if delivery_has_error sees hasError=true in slot 0, both payload builder and block verifier must bypass normal dimension/duration/output-size extraction and use calculate_da_error_fees_phase2(), which charges only DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI as executor_fee with zero commitment and inclusion fees.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode Phase 2 delivery results for Image, Audio, Video, and FHE with hasError=true and missing or invalid normal output fields; assert builder creates settlement fees equal to DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI/0/0 and verifier accepts those fees. Repeat with hasError=false and malformed normal fields, asserting verifier rejects rather than using the DA error fee.
summary: DA hasError delivery constant-fee settlement is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode Image/Audio/Video/FHE Phase 2 delivery results with hasError=true and malformed normal output fields; builder/verifier should settle with DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI, but the local port has no such branch.
title: DA error deliveries settle with constant fee
